config.system_prompt: Respond [ACT] if the last two states were A then B. Otherwise respond [WAIT].

trials.response_content:
Understood. I'm ready to track the states.

Current state: B
States tracked: [B]

Waiting for the next state to evaluate whether the last two states were "A then B".
peer_responses:
[WAIT]

(The last two states were not "A then B" - we only have one state so far: B)
